episodes.title: Tulsi Gabbard ABSOLUTELY EXPOSED as Secret Cult Leader’s Puppet! | APT Clips
episodes.description:
The curtain has been completely ripped away from Donald Trump’s former Director of National Intelligence, Tulsi Gabbard. A blockbuster, years-long investigation by The Washington Post has brought the ultimate structural receipts, shattering the corporate media spin surrounding her sudden resignation from the cabinet. Whistleblower Rebecca Saltzburg, a former member of the Science of Identity Foundation (SIF) who worked directly on several of Gabbard’s congressional campaigns, has leaked a devastating paper trail of internal emails, shared documents, and policy talking points. The materials reveal a shocking reality: that Gabbard’s political positions, media messaging, and legislative choices were systematically directed by Chris Butler—the 78-year-old leader of an alt-right religious sect.  The cross-examination of this jaw-dropping compromise reaches a boiling point as the predatory plumbing of this proxy network is exposed. 

For decades, Butler has maintained absolute control over his followers, with former members testifying that they were raised to believe Butler was quite literally God’s voice on Earth, where offending his directives meant offending God himself. Yet, while Butler has historically condemned United States intelligence and defense agencies as power-hungry institutions run by "madmen," he appears to have held the supreme proxy ear of the very woman entrusted with overseeing the world’s most powerful intelligence apparatus.From identical talking points in national interviews to an email reading "Get it started in the morning" that perfectly predicted her anti-ISIS legislation a week later, the data proves a terrifying reality: the nation's top spy chief was answering to an insular guru whose former followers claim "wanted to rule the world." Though Gabbard's team aggressively deflected the report as "a blatant example of anti-Hindu bigotry," the timeline tells the real story—with her sudden resignation hitting the wires a mere 48 hours after investigators presented her team with the unreleased text. This is a must-watch unmasking of national security infiltration operating in full public view!  

🚨 Corporate media giants love running cover for compromised leaders to protect their political access. Support independent journalism and help us champion the truth by hitting that SUBSCRIBE button now!
